description: Dr. Chen wants to speed up prescribing for Strep Throat. Using the credentials (username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'), create a prescription favorite named 'Strep Throat - Amox 500' for patient 'Mario Rossi'. The favorite should be for Amoxicillin 500mg with instructions 'Take 1 capsule three times daily for 10 days', a quantity of 30, and 0 repeats. Ensure the favorite is saved to the Favorites list for future use.
